Meeting notes for monthly meetings between Anni S, Anniina & Heini (in Finnish): Anni_phd_kokousmuistiot

Meeting notes for monthly meetings between Anni S, Anniina & Heini (in Finnish): Anni_phd_kokousmuistiot

15.10.25

15.10.25

Nanostring

Nanostring

2nd Nanostring batch is underway - data expected between December and February

2nd Nanostring batch is underway - data expected between December and February

Results from 1st Nanostring pilot are good, although more data is needed

Results from 1st Nanostring pilot are good, although more data is needed

tCycIF

tCycIF

p21(HGSC) is excluded from all analyses (HGSC)

p21(HGSC) is excluded from all analyses (HGSC)

CD206 is excluded from the panel

CD206 is excluded from the panel

Problems with Mesmer

Problems with Mesmer

Segmentation could be tried with S3Segmenter or Cellpose

Segmentation could be tried with S3Segmenter or Cellpose

ESGO

ESGO

Abstract submission deadline 31.10.

Abstract submission deadline 31.10.

Preliminary Nanostring and tCycIF results included in the abstract

Preliminary Nanostring and tCycIF results included in the abstract

We’ve done tCycIF on 17 gyn cancer samples

We’ve done tCycIF on 17 gyn cancer samples

Distinct staining patterns on different histologies

Distinct staining patterns on different histologies

Interestingly we observed the main MAPK pathway activation at higher levels

Interestingly we observed the main MAPK pathway activation at higher levels

23.6.25

23.6.25

Patient cohort:

Patient cohort:

17 patients

17 patients

10 LGSC

10 LGSC

3 HGSC

3 HGSC

1 ovarian endometrioid carcinoma

1 ovarian endometrioid carcinoma

1 ovarian mucinous carcinoma

1 ovarian mucinous carcinoma

1 vaginal adenocarcinoma

1 vaginal adenocarcinoma

1 uterine high grade serous carcinoma

1 uterine high grade serous carcinoma

14 patients have targetable mutations (KRAS, BRAF, NF1, NRAS, MEK2, MEK1)

14 patients have targetable mutations (KRAS, BRAF, NF1, NRAS, MEK2, MEK1)

13 patients have received MEK inhibitor treatment (2 of them don’t harbor any targetable mutations)

13 patients have received MEK inhibitor treatment (2 of them don’t harbor any targetable mutations)

tCycIF panel: Project_33_FINPROVE_gyn_tCycIF.xlsx

tCycIF panel: Project_33_FINPROVE_gyn_tCycIF.xlsx

Validation document:

Validation document:

Agenda:

Agenda:

Validation for pCREB, pJNK, and pERK

Validation for pCREB, pJNK, and pERK

Panel selection pSTAT1 antibody - include or not?

Panel selection pSTAT1 antibody - include or not?

Would need a 7th cycle - is this possible schedulewise?

Would need a 7th cycle - is this possible schedulewise?

If we are adding pSTAT1, we would have space for a 488 marker and a 647 marker

If we are adding pSTAT1, we would have space for a 488 marker and a 647 marker

Meeting notes:

Meeting notes:

Validation panels are critical; we need to represent our validation samples as convincingly as possible to convey the information from our samples to the reviewers’ eyes - include both negative and positive samples/sites - pay attention to the localization of the antibody

Validation panels are critical; we need to represent our validation samples as convincingly as possible to convey the information from our samples to the reviewers’ eyes - include both negative and positive samples/sites - pay attention to the localization of the antibody

In the future, include normal tissues with the cancer samples

In the future, include normal tissues with the cancer samples

Display several functional markers overlaid, i.e. pCREB and pERK on top of each other

Display several functional markers overlaid, i.e. pCREB and pERK on top of each other

Ada/Fernando has a base to which we can make the validation figure (publication quality)

Ada/Fernando has a base to which we can make the validation figure (publication quality)

✔️tCycIF panel: swap cd4 to cycle2, cd206 cycle3, cd163 cycle 5, cd3d and panCK, nkg2a to cycle 3, move other af647 one cycle down. Move Vimentin to cycle 1, add cd138 to cycle 2, add b-catenin to cycle 3.

✔️tCycIF panel: swap cd4 to cycle2, cd206 cycle3, cd163 cycle 5, cd3d and panCK, nkg2a to cycle 3, move other af647 one cycle down. Move Vimentin to cycle 1, add cd138 to cycle 2, add b-catenin to cycle 3.

✔️Add functional cycle as 2nd cycle: Ki67-488, HLA-DPB1-647, pSTAT1-555

✔️Add functional cycle as 2nd cycle: Ki67-488, HLA-DPB1-647, pSTAT1-555

Add spacers for the small biopsy sample(s) only

Add spacers for the small biopsy sample(s) only

First cycle on Wed 25.6., during which we have to ensure scan time <12 min to make the cycles fit and enable us to do the 7th and 8th cycles

First cycle on Wed 25.6., during which we have to ensure scan time <12 min to make the cycles fit and enable us to do the 7th and 8th cycles

✔️Think of swapping out CD45 (750), CD3D (555), aSMA (488), CD20 (647), and to replace with more tumoricentric markers - make a list of cancer cell-focused markers that have been validated

✔️Think of swapping out CD45 (750), CD3D (555), aSMA (488), CD20 (647), and to replace with more tumoricentric markers - make a list of cancer cell-focused markers that have been validated

✔️An additional 8th cycle with functional markers so that we could extract additional data if the scheduling allows - need to see if we have potential antibodies in our inventory

✔️An additional 8th cycle with functional markers so that we could extract additional data if the scheduling allows - need to see if we have potential antibodies in our inventory

4.6.25

4.6.25

Meeting notes:

Meeting notes:

16.5.25

16.5.25

Meeting notes:

Meeting notes:

tCycIF experimental form filled

tCycIF experimental form filled

tCycIF experiment sheet fill started

tCycIF experiment sheet fill started

13.5.25

13.5.25

Meeting notes:

Meeting notes:

Antibodies are ordered, we use only phospho antibodies

Antibodies are ordered, we use only phospho antibodies

The ESS case is actually an endometrial carcinoma -> panCK works as a marker for all samples

The ESS case is actually an endometrial carcinoma -> panCK works as a marker for all samples

We are in schedule: validation/optimization in June, tCycIF in July

We are in schedule: validation/optimization in June, tCycIF in July

Action items:

Action items:

Anni S, Joonas: register project: project form experimental form

Anni S, Joonas: register project: project form experimental form

Anni S: confirm with Anni V that the sectioning will be done before June, and that the CycIF sections are cut in series (section sequentiality is recorded)

Anni S: confirm with Anni V that the sectioning will be done before June, and that the CycIF sections are cut in series (section sequentiality is recorded)

Joonas: decide on inclusion of pSTAT1 antibody to panel

Joonas: decide on inclusion of pSTAT1 antibody to panel

29.4.25

29.4.25

Meeting between Joonas and Anni S, Joonas described tCycIF phosphoantibody selection sent to Saun. More details on antibodies selected can be found at: 33_FINPROVE MEKi cohort abs for tCycIF, and the order has been forwarded to Saun on 29.4.

Meeting between Joonas and Anni S, Joonas described tCycIF phosphoantibody selection sent to Saun. More details on antibodies selected can be found at: 33_FINPROVE MEKi cohort abs for tCycIF, and the order has been forwarded to Saun on 29.4.

23.4.25

23.4.25

Joonas’ notes:

Joonas’ notes:

Samples are in Anni V’s office – 18 samples in total (tissue blocks). Pathology cuts sections at the same time as preparing the NanoString tissue scrolls

Samples are in Anni V’s office – 18 samples in total (tissue blocks). Pathology cuts sections at the same time as preparing the NanoString tissue scrolls

tCycIF sections need to be cut with the scrolls – info has not been passed to Anni yet. 4 µm sections on SuperFrost Plus slides

tCycIF sections need to be cut with the scrolls – info has not been passed to Anni yet. 4 µm sections on SuperFrost Plus slides

10 slides for at least two patients positive for targeted mutations, 6 for others. Prioritize large samples for validation

10 slides for at least two patients positive for targeted mutations, 6 for others. Prioritize large samples for validation

Tiny samples cannot be used for nanostring

Tiny samples cannot be used for nanostring

Pick 3 phospho-something antibodies for the panel, from CST, need to be from different hosts if unconjugated, order ASAP

Pick 3 phospho-something antibodies for the panel, from CST, need to be from different hosts if unconjugated, order ASAP

Go through the disease types and see if cancer markers are usable, Anni V can be asked for markers for sarcomas/ADCs

Go through the disease types and see if cancer markers are usable, Anni V can be asked for markers for sarcomas/ADCs
